songs.title: So Easy (To Fall in Love)
songs.content:
{title: So Easy (To Fall in Love) — Olivia Dean}

[Fmaj7]I could be the [Cmaj7]make you [G7]twist, the one to [Em7]stop
The [Fmaj7]cake, the [Cmaj7]icing on your [G7]cherry on the [Em7]top
[Fmaj7]There's [Cmaj7]Heaven in my [G7]heart, and we could [Em7]find you some space

[Fmaj7]Mm-[Cmaj7]mm

[Fmaj7]I could be the [Cmaj7]missing [G7]world to you, the [Em7]piece
The [Fmaj7]kind of [Cmaj7]extra [G7]sentimental [Em7]chemistry
[Fmaj7]Some [Cmaj7]people make it [G7]look so [Em7]easy
